settings.astext: Digital jewelry pioneer Rupesh Jain, founder of Candere, is back with Lucira, a modern technology Lab Grown Diamond jewelry brand. Positioned as the "Rings King", Lucira focuses on proposals, weddings, and achievements with ethical, personalized designs. The brand offers IGI/SGL  certified Lab Grown Diamonds, a digital experience, and plans for a phased retail expansion, aiming to become India's first global Lab Grown Diamond luxury house.

Lucira is a Lab Grown Diamond jewelry brand founded by Rupesh Jain, the entrepreneur behind Candere. Built for modern, design conscious consumers, Lucira focuses on meaningful moments like proposals, weddings, anniversaries. Combining ethical sourcing, heritage craftsmanship, and a digital-first approach, Lucira offers certified, design-led jewelry that reflects values, emotion, and contemporary elegance.

settings.asheading: CRAFTED TO HONOR MOMENTS THAT MATTER
settings.astext: Lucira, by Rupesh Jain, combines Lab Grown brilliance with thoughtful design and tech-driven personalization. Focused on emotional milestones and sustainable values, it’s launching online with handcrafted collections and signature cuts, poised to shape the future of global luxury from an Indian foundation.

settings.asheading: RUPESH JAIN RETURNS WITH A SPARKLING VISION
settings.astext: Jewellery entrepreneur Rupesh Jain, who founded Candere before its acquisition by Kalyan Jewellers, returns with Lucira a Lab Grown Diamond jewellery brand. Catering to modern consumers, Lucira offers design-forward collections and positions itself as the unrivalled “King of Rings,” celebrating proposals, weddings, anniversaries, and personal milestones with intentional, ethically crafted pieces.

settings.asheading: LUCIRA POSITIONS ITSELF AT THE FOREFRONT OF A GROWING MARKET
settings.astext: Lucira is reimagining luxury through Lab Grown Diamonds, merging sustainability, design precision, and digital innovation. The brand focuses on intentional jewellery that honours personal meaning. With handcrafted collections, AI-led customisation, and a bold omnichannel vision, Lucira is shaping a transparent, value-driven future for modern jewellery.

Redefining sparkle with purpose, Lucira blends Lab Grown Diamonds, conscious design, and digital innovation to craft jewellery that reflects modern values. Founded by Rupesh Jain, the brand embraces sustainability and elegance, with a bold plan to scale globally and become India’s signature name in meaningful, modern luxury.

Rupesh Jain, founder of Candere, returns with Lucira, a Lab Grown Diamond brand offering ethical, design led luxury for modern consumers. Celebrating milestones through handcrafted pieces made with certified diamonds and recycled gold, Lucira blends heritage craftsmanship with AI personalization and digital first convenience. With global ambitions, it aims to become India’s flagship lab-grown diamond luxury house.

settings.asheading: ELEVATES SOLITAIRE JEWELLERY WITH A SUSTAINABLE FOCUS
settings.astext: Launching around Akshaya Tritiya, Lucira enters the lab-grown diamond jewellery market targeting eco-conscious millennials and Gen Z. Founded by Rupesh Jain, it taps into a $59.2 billion global opportunity. Beginning as a digital-first brand, Lucira will expand omnichannel and focus on becoming the go-to destination for solitaire rings.

settings.asheading: COLLECTIVE STRENGTH DRIVES INDIA’S JEWELRY INDUSTRY FORWARD
settings.astext: Rupesh Jain, founder of Lucira and ex-Candere, believes India’s jewellery market is shifting from occasion-based to everyday wear. Lucira focuses on Lab Grown solitaires and emotional jewellery like proposal rings. Drawing from Kalyan Jewellers experience, he emphasizes coexistence between startups and legacy brands, with trust and innovation as keys.

settings.asheading: SHAPING A SUSTAINABLE FUTURE IN JEWELLERY
settings.astext: Redefining luxury through purpose and innovation, Lucira is crafting modern heirlooms with Lab Grown brilliance and sustainable values. Launched in April, the brand blends design, technology, and customer insight, with 500+ SKUs and plans for offline expansion, global reach, and eco-conscious practices from solar-powered manufacturing to tree planting with every purchase.

settings.asheading: A REFINED COLLECTION FOR MEANINGFUL MOMENTS
settings.astext: Lucira’s debut collection celebrates modern elegance with consciously crafted Lab Grown Diamond pieces designed for everyday wear and special moments alike. From delicate hoops to romantic pendants and versatile rings, each design blends timeless beauty with sustainability, capturing emotion, individuality, and the spirit of meaningful luxury.

settings.asheading: FOR WOMEN WHO STYLE LIFE ON THE MOVE
settings.astext: Lucira’s Bezel Collection redefines jewellery for the modern woman, designed to move with strength, intention, and grace. Inspired by the idea of inner stillness and outer momentum, each Lab Grown Diamond is bezel-set for durability, comfort, and brilliance, making On The Move a debut collection crafted for everyday motion and meaning.

settings.asheading: JEWELLERY THAT MOVES WITH MODERN FEMININITY
settings.astext: Lucira’s debut collection "On The Move" redefines luxury for today’s dynamic woman. Featuring bezel-set Lab Grown Diamonds, the collection blends strength, fluidity, and purpose. Designed for everyday versatility, it reflects modern femininity and ethical elegance, aligning style with sustainability and celebrating motion as a symbol of empowered living.
